steps.name: retry-engine
steps.summary: RetryEngine with fixed backoff [10s,30s,60s], 120s cap, 3 max attempts; ScannerRunner updated with optional retry_config (backward-compatible)

steps.name: failure-handler
steps.summary: FailureHandler with tier-based deterministic policy: critical/high block on scan failure (override available), medium/low warn_and_proceed; 8 unit tests

steps.name: override-mechanism
steps.summary: OverrideManager with JSONL audit trail, OVR-YYYY-MMDD-NNN ID format, predefined reasons, SLA deadline, pending override query; 6 unit tests

steps.name: cli-integration
steps.summary: Assess command integrated with failure policy (--retry, --force-override, --override-reason, --override-justification flags); status command for pending overrides; demo.py failure policy step; ADR-010 added; 7 unit tests
